heading: Programs to be consistent with programs administered by the Department of Veterans Affairs
label: 2185 Programs to be consistent with programs administered by the Department of Veterans Affairs
text: Regulations prescribed to carry out this chapter shall provide that the programs under this chapter shall be consistent with the educational assistance programs under chapters 35 and 36 of title 38.
notes: Amendments1989— substituted “the Department of Veterans Affairs” for “the Veterans’ Administration” in section catchline.Pub. L. 101–189
